revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 29일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月廿九]][[zh:十二月廿九]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 29|qq=December 29}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}} the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} . == Events == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 9th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1567|en|1567|qid=Q6642|lt=1567|1=1567}} {{ill|February 8|en|February 8|qid=Q2323|lt=February 8|1=February 8}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Ieyasu|ja|松平家康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Ieyasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川家康|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q171977}} was granted permission by the {{ill|Imperial Court|ja|朝廷 (日本)|lt=Imperial Court|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Court|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Imperial Court of Japan|qid=Q30253177}} to adopt the {{ill|Tokugawa family name|ja|徳川姓|lt=Tokugawa Surname|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa family name|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , and changed his name to {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} . He was awarded the court Rank of {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank, Lower, Mikawa no Kami|ja|従五位下三河守|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower, Mikawa no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank, Lower, Mikawa no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} .{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1820|en|1820|qid=Q6973|lt=1820|1=1820}} {{ill|February 13|en|February 13|qid=Q2333|lt=February 13|1=February 13}} ) – The haiku collection {{ill|Our Spring|ja|おらが春|lt=Our Spring|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Our Spring|1=The Spring of My Life|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11262635}} by {{ill|Kobayashi Issa|en|Kobayashi Issa|qid=Q312709|lt=Kobayashi Issa|1=Kobayashi Issa}} was completed. == Births == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 7th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1565|en|1565|qid=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}} {{ill|January 31|en|January 31|qid=Q2289|lt=January 31|1=January 31}} ) – {{ill|Ikeda Terumasa|en|Ikeda Terumasa|qid=Q1385927|lt=Ikeda Terumasa|1=Ikeda Terumasa}} , a {{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} and {{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|qid=Q61982|lt=daimyo|1=Daimyo}} (died {{ill|1613|en|1613|qid=Q6776|lt=1613|1=1613}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1834|en|1834|qid=Q7591|lt=1834|1=1834}} {{ill|February 7|en|February 7|qid=Q2322|lt=February 7|1=February 7}} ) – {{ill|Hirozawa Maomi|ja|広沢真臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirozawa Maomi|1=Hirosawa Saneomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11485503}} , a samurai of the {{ill|Choshu Domain|ja|Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain|2=ja|3=長州藩|lt=Choshu Domain|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Choshu Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q876267}} and politician (died {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1836|en|1836|qid=Q7601|lt=1836|1=1836}} {{ill|February 15|en|February 15|qid=Q2334|lt=February 15|1=February 15}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|en|Matsudaira Katamori|qid=Q569441|lt=Matsudaira Katamori|1=Matsudaira Katamori}} , the lord of the {{ill|Aizu Domain|1=Aizu Domain|2=ja|3=会津藩|ja|Aizu Domain|1=Aizu Domain|2=ja|3=会津藩|lt=Aizu Domain|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizu Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4389944}} (died {{ill|1893|en|1893|qid=Q7840|lt=1893|1=1893}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|qid=Q7673|lt=1855|1=1855}} {{ill|February 15|en|February 15|qid=Q2334|lt=February 15|1=February 15}} ) – {{ill|Tsuda Sanzō|en|Tsuda Sanzō|qid=Q2458477|lt=Tsuda Sanzō|1=Tsuda Sanzō}} , the perpetrator of the {{ill|Ōtsu incident|en|Ōtsu incident|qid=Q386352|lt=Ōtsu Incident|1=Ōtsu incident}} (died {{ill|1891|en|1891|qid=Q7837|lt=1891|1=1891}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 4th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|qid=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}} {{ill|January 20|en|January 20|qid=Q2267|lt=January 20|1=January 20}} ) – {{ill|Ōnomatsu Midorinosuke|en|Ōnomatsu Midorinosuke|qid=Q3874639|lt=Abu Matsumidorinosuke|1=Ōnomatsu Midorinosuke}} , the 6th {{ill|yokozuna|ja|横綱|lt=yokozuna|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/yokozuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Yokozuna|qid=Q1067277}} (born {{ill|1791|en|1791|qid=Q7784|lt=1791|1=1791}} ). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Ōmisoka|en|Ōmisoka|qid=Q2357104|lt=New Year's Eve|1=Ōmisoka}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|28|12|30|11|29|1|12|1229|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
